onboarding.onboarding_1_description: Experience a smarter, faster, and safer way to transport medical samples across hospital departments using our autonomous robotic system.
onboarding.onboarding_2_description: Reduce infection risks and eliminate human errors with fully automated, secure transportation of medical samples.
onboarding.onboarding_3_description: Monitor robot status, location, and delivery progress instantly through a user-friendly mobile app.
onboarding.onboarding_4_title: Powered by Robotics, IoT & Embedded Systems
onboarding.onboarding_4_description: Our system integrates ROS, IoT sensors, and embedded controllers to deliver a reliable and scalable hospital solution.
